Its exceptional architectural heritage is an integral part of the town's spa identity, and it houses both slot machines and gaming tables in a prestigious setting.

The casino is part of the Évian Resort group (formerly Royal Resort), a key heritage destination on the French side of Lake Geneva. The slot floor and table games occupy elegant Belle-Époque rooms that double as venues for events and entertainment throughout the year.
